findings.description: Digital signature metadata rendered as visible inline text in the HTML, disrupting reading order between 'From' block and 'Subject' block.
findings.evidence: PDF page 1 shows 'From: Elizabeth S. Werner / Division of Waste Management / Raleigh Central Office' followed directly by the Subject line. HTML inserts 'Digitally signed by Elizabeth S Werner / DN: cn=Elizabeth S Werner, o=DWM-Soild Waste, ou=NCDENR, email=elizabeth.werner@ncdenr.gov, c=US / Date: 2016.04.28 10:23:05 -04'00'' as visible text between From and Subject, which is not visually present in the PDF.

findings.description: The handwritten signature of Elizabeth S. Werner visible in the PDF (page 1) has no corresponding tag in the HTML. The digital signature metadata text is present, but the actual cursive signature image is missing.
findings.evidence: PDF page 1 shows a cursive handwritten signature next to the digital signature block. HTML only contains the digital signature text ('Digitally signed by Elizabeth S Werner...') but no element for the handwritten signature.
